TripAdvisor ( (TRIP) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 18, 2026, Tripadvisor announced that Board Chair Greg B. Maffei and director Albert E. Rosenthaler informed the company they will not stand for re-election at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, effectively retiring from the Board. The company emphasized that their departures do not stem from any disagreement over operations, policies, or practices, signaling an orderly leadership transition for governance stakeholders rather than a response to internal conflict.
